description: New TypeScript AppHosts are now scaffolded as `apphost.mts` using explicit ES module syntax, with the code generator emitting `.mts` SDK files. Existing `apphost.ts` projects continue to work unchanged, and `aspire init` in brownfield apps safely creates a nested `aspire-apphost/` package without modifying the root module settings.
name: TypeScript AppHosts use explicit ES modules (.mts)
